grip.title: Grip Strength Assessment
grip.subtitle: Enter peak grip. Save to traction axis.

referenceInfo.title: Assessment References
referenceInfo.p1: Formula: score = peakKg × 1.4, ×1.6 for female. One decimal; may exceed 100.
referenceInfo.p2: Model cap: 160 kg. Inputs above cap clamp for scoring and storage.
referenceInfo.p3: Cap benchmark: Magnus Samuelsson. Product guardrail — not meet certification.

grip.capNoticeBody: Entered {{input}} kg, above cap of {{max}} kg. Scoring and saved value locked to {{max}} kg.
grip.nextMilestoneHint: Next Milestone: {{points}} pts until next tier upgrade.
grip.submitDone: Saved — Home radar and merged scores use this grip axis.
grip.profileIncompleteHint: Complete Home profile (sex, age, height, weight) for grip conversion.

errors.missing-profile: Complete physical profile on Home first.
errors.invalid-peak: Enter positive peak grip value in kg.
